underlying_goal: Design and implement an optimized data schema for insurance demand letter generation, including schema structure, field descriptions, directives, and planning the AI-powered schema builder system
friction_detail: Claude bypassed the repository pattern when creating directives, resulting in missing PromptDefinitions, and initially created empty prompts that were useless without content.
brief_summary: User iteratively designed a Colossus-optimized demand letter schema with proper cardinality, descriptions, and directives, plus planned an AI schema builder system — mostly achieved with some rework needed on prompts and directives.
